errorBoundary.description: The application encountered a problem. You can reload the page or contact support if the error persists.

auth.headline: Food safety management made simple.

checklist.addNcComment: ⚠ Add a non-conformity comment above to validate

editor.title: Checklist — {{name}}
editor.subtitle: Manage the control points of this template
editor.itemLabelPh: E.g.: Reception temperature, Product DLC, Manager signature…
editor.optionsHint: Each comma-separated value will become a selection button.
editor.photoHint: 📷 The operator will need to take or select a photo from their device.

editor.dateHint: 📅 The operator will need to enter a date and time.
